facilities.title: Warm Water Pools
facilities.description: All our pools are heated and child‑friendly, ensuring a comfortable learning environment.

facilities.title: Certified Instructors
facilities.description: Our team is fully certified and trained to teach children of all ages and skill levels.

facilities.title: Safe & Modern Facilities

integrations.cta_subtitle: Choose the location that fits your schedule and enroll today.

security.title: Safety first
security.subtitle: Our lessons follow all official swimming safety standards

instructors.title: Certified instructors
instructors.text: All instructors are ENVOZ/NRZ‑certified and trained in child‑friendly teaching methods, safety protocols, and first aid.

pools.title: Warm & safe pools
pools.text: We teach only in pools that meet strict safety and hygiene standards, with constant temperature monitoring.

supervision.title: Lifeguard supervision
supervision.text: Every lesson is supervised by certified lifeguards to ensure maximum safety for all children.

facilities.title: Clean & hygienic facilities
facilities.text: Our pools are cleaned daily, and water quality is tested multiple times per day according to Dutch regulations.

emergency.title: Emergency readiness
emergency.text: Our team is trained in emergency response, CPR, and child rescue techniques to ensure a safe environment.

transparency.title: Parent transparency
transparency.text: Parents can always observe lessons and receive updates on progress, safety, and comfort.

starter.name: Starter
starter.description: Perfect for beginners and first swimming lessons.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions

items.question: What should my child bring to the first lesson?
items.answer: A swimsuit, towel, and slippers are enough. We provide all floating materials and safety equipment.

items.question: Can parents watch lessons?
items.answer: Yes! All pools have viewing areas where parents can watch comfortably.

items.question: What if my child is afraid of water?
items.answer: Our instructors are trained to handle water anxiety and will work with your child to build confidence.

items.question: How long does it take to get a diploma?
items.answer: This varies by child, but most students complete A, B, and C diplomas within 1-2 years.

faq.more_subtitle: Our team is here to help you with anything related to swimming lessons.
